nasb.text: To You they cried out and were delivered; In You they trusted and were not disappointed.

esv.text: To you they cried and were rescued; in you they trusted and were not put to shame.

cnv.text: 他們向你哀求，就得拯救； 他們倚靠你，就不失望。

ccb.text: 他们向你呼求， 就得到拯救； 他们信靠你， 就不会失望。

csbs.text: 他们向你哀求就得拯救； 他们依靠你就不致蒙羞。
